title: Quiz: Course Summary and Final Assessment

questions.question: What algorithms does FIPS 203 standardize?
questions.explanation: FIPS 203 standardizes ML-KEM for key encapsulation.

questions.question: What is the foundation of ML-KEM and ML-DSA security?
questions.explanation: Both ML-KEM and ML-DSA are based on lattice problems.

questions.question: Why is SLH-DSA considered the most conservative option?

options.text: Relies only on hash function security

questions.explanation: SLH-DSA makes minimal assumptions, relying only on hash security.

questions.question: What is the key lesson from the SIKE break?

options.text: Crypto agility and hybrid approaches are essential

questions.explanation: SIKE's break showed even analyzed schemes can fail unexpectedly.

questions.question: What should organizations do NOW for PQC?

options.text: Inventory crypto, plan migration, deploy hybrid

questions.explanation: Active preparation is needed due to HNDL threat and migration time.

questions.question: What does hybrid cryptography provide?

options.text: Defense in depth against both classical and quantum

questions.explanation: Hybrid is secure if EITHER component is secure.

questions.question: What is the recommended ML-KEM variant for most applications?
The PQC migration should be completed before cryptographically relevant quantum computers exist.
questions.explanation: Due to HNDL and migration time, preparation must begin now.
